---
title: "Assignment 1"
author: "Hanwen Liu"
format:
  html: 
   toc: true
  pdf: 
   toc: true
---

## Introduction
## Research Question


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)

data <- read_csv("data/36506370_Hanwen Liu.csv")
```


```{r}
data <- data |> 
  drop_na(purchase_amount,marketing_spend) |> 
  mutate(signup_date = parse_date_time(signup_date, orders = c("mdy", "ymd", "dmy")))
```
